title: Tech Stack Analysis
description: Analyze languages, frameworks, dependencies, build system, package managers, runtime configuration.
findings: Avalonia/.NET desktop app; SDK 9.0.315 local, app mostly net8.0, launcher net9.0; NUKE handles publish; GitHub Actions release matrix; EdgeTtsSharp submodule.

title: Architecture Analysis
description: Analyze project structure, module boundaries, layer architecture, data flow patterns, entry points, API surface.
findings: Layered solution: Desktop bootstrap -> app library -> Core/Shared abstractions -> platform implementations; generic host + DI registry powers UI components, notifications, automation, plugins and management.

title: Features Analysis
description: Inventory user-facing capabilities, API endpoints, CLI commands, UI components, background jobs, integrations.
findings: Main features: timetable display/editing, profile import/export, configurable components/themes, notifications/speech/weather, automation, plugins, IPC, update, recovery and management mode.

title: Cross-cutting Concerns
description: Analyze error handling patterns, logging strategy, authentication/authorization, configuration management, testing approach, observability.
findings: Build succeeds but has many warnings; no test projects; config backup/recovery and Sentry/file logging exist; notable risks include global service locator, broad static state, warning debt and weak local password hash.
